name: hs-earth-env-site
description: HTML prototype of the HS Earth & Environmental Science course Site (AISC, AY 2026-27).

scripts.sync-simulator: cp ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/tectonic-city-builder.html src/assets/simulators/tectonic-city-builder.html && echo 'v1 simulator synced from sibling folder.'
scripts.sync-simulator-v2: rm -rf src/assets/simulators/v2 && mkdir -p src/assets/simulators/v2 && cp ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/v2/index.html ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/v2/styles.css ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/v2/scenarios.js ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/v2/tech.js ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/v2/case-studies.js ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/v2/sprites.js ../Plate-Tectonics-City-Builder/v2/game.js src/assets/simulators/v2/ && echo 'v2 simulator runtime files synced.'
scripts.sync-habitability: mkdir -p src/assets/simulators/habitability && cp ../Habitability-Zone-Calculator/habitability-zone-calculator.html src/assets/simulators/habitability/index.html && echo 'Habitability Zone Calculator synced from sibling folder.'
